token_surfaces.credential_location: GitHub Actions secret (repository/environment scope unknown from repo)
token_surfaces.lineage: secrets.MINDSHIFT_API_KEY -> curl POST /session,/continuity,/authority,/compile,/validate,/execute,/proof -> governed deploy artifact + wrapper deploy -> production runtime + code deployment mutation
token_surfaces.legitimacy_binding_status: Bound in governed-deploy path; deploy-enabling use in prepare-governed-deploy exists before validate/proof completion.

token_surfaces.credential_location: GitHub Actions secret (repository/environment scope unknown from repo)
token_surfaces.lineage: secrets.MINDSHIFT_WORKER_URL -> endpoint routing for runtime mutation calls
token_surfaces.legitimacy_binding_status: Not itself authority, but endpoint redirection can influence where API key authority is applied.

token_surfaces.credential_location: GitHub Actions secret or local shell env (exact name not declared in workflow)
token_surfaces.lineage: Cloudflare deploy credential -> npx wrangler deploy src/index.ts --config wrangler.toml -> Cloudflare Worker deployment mutation
token_surfaces.legitimacy_binding_status: Wrapper-enforced in governed workflow, but same token class can deploy outside canonical chain from any authenticated context.

token_surfaces.credential_location: local Wrangler auth state on operator machine
token_surfaces.lineage: local wrangler login state -> wrangler deploy command -> production deployment mutation
token_surfaces.legitimacy_binding_status: Outside repository-governed legitimacy coupling unless human/operator process enforces wrapper discipline.

token_surfaces.credential_location: ephemeral GITHUB_TOKEN issued by GitHub Actions
token_surfaces.lineage: job token with contents/actions read only -> workflow metadata/artifact read access
token_surfaces.legitimacy_binding_status: No deploy mutation privilege evidenced in repo workflows.

token_surfaces.lineage: admin secret mutation -> alter deploy credentials/workflow inputs -> governed or unguided deployment mutation
token_surfaces.legitimacy_binding_status: External root authority assumption not verifiable from repository contents.

unverifiable_root_authority_assumptions: Cloudflare account owner/admin may deploy independently of GitHub workflow.
GitHub repository/admin may mutate secret material and workflow permissions.
Repository environment protection rules and reviewer approvals are not represented in tracked files.
